description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows CI that triggers on pull requests. The workflow runs on a windows-latest environment, checks out the code, sets up CMake 3.22.x, installs dependencies using vcpkg, configures the build with various HPX options including fetch ASIO and HWLoc, builds the project using Visual Studio 17 2022, installs it, and runs tests using ctest with specific configurations and exclusions.
